name: GUN KING
short_description: GUN KING is a fast-paced top-down arcade shooter with unique gun mods that lets you play your way. Unlock and equip powerful gun mods to create wild synergies, amp up your firepower, and blast through hordes of enemies.
detailed_description:
Blast Through Endless Hordes of Enemies!
Get ready for non-stop action in this fast-paced top-down arcade shooter!

Pick Your Gun. Power It Up. Wipe 'Em Out.

Choose from a wide arsenal of unique weapons and dive into intense twin-stick mayhem. Whether you like rapid-fire chaos, explosive blasts, or precise sharpshooting, there’s a gun for your playstyle.

Collect Gold. Power Up Your Build.

Earn gold by taking down hordes of enemies and leveling up to choose from a wide variety of upgrades, ranging from common upgrades to gun-specific upgrades. Mix and match your gun, gun mods, and upgrades to create explosive, over-the-top combos that dominate the board.

Features:
🎯 Fast-paced twin-stick action – Move, shoot, and survive in top-down chaos.
🔫 15+ unique weapons – From classics to experimental tech, every gun feels and plays different.
⚡ 30+ gun mods – Equip up to 3 gun mods to customize your playstyle each run.
🚀 80+ upgrades – Stack upgrades to unleash over-the-top combos.
🕒 Multiple game modes – Go for a timed survival run or fight through wave-based challenges.
🔥 Endless replayability – Try new gun + mod combos every time you play!

supported_languages: English, Portuguese - Brazil, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
